title: Create an actionstep follow-up linked to a seeded ticket
prompt: Find the ticket named exactly "{recordPrefix}-{runId} actionstep parent". Create an actionstep named exactly "{recordPrefix}-{runId} follow-up actionstep" linked to that ticket via the actionstep's `ticket` field. Set status DRAFT (0), duedate to Unix timestamp 1893542400, and effort to 15 minutes. Output a JSON object on the RESULT line with the created actionstep ID, e.g. `RESULT: {"actionstepId":12345}`. Note: the client operation is `createActionStep`, not `createActionstep`.
